---
title: "Skills"
---

## Data Science

* R and RStudio     
  Packages include:
  + tidyverse
    - ggplot 2 
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - readr
    - purr 
    - tibble
    - stringr
    - forcats
  + knitr
  + reticulate
  + sf (simple features)
  + leaflet
  + devtools
  + downloader
* Python     
  Libraries include:
  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Scipy
  + Plotly
* SQL 
  + Oracle
  + MySQL
* Tableau
* Excel / Google Sheets
* Data Intuition and Insight    
  Topics including:
  + Numerical and Graphical Summaries
  + Measures of Spread
  + Normal Distribution and Z-scores
  + Probability  

## Computer Engineering

* Embedded Systems
  + C 
  + Python
* Digital Systems
  + Verilog
  + FPGA 
    - Artix 7
    - Kintex-7
  + Simulation
    - Verilog Test Bench
    - Logisim
* Real Time Operating Systems
  + ROS (Robot Operating System)
  + VxWorks
  + FreeRTOS
* Assembly and Register-level C 
* Circuit Analysis
  + LTspice Software
  + Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps
    - MOSFETS
    - BJT
  + Basic Ciruits
    - Inductors
    - Capacitors 
    - Resistors

## Web Development

* HTML
* CSS
* Javascript
* YAML and Rmd     
  Basic building blocks:
  + knitr (R package)
  + _site.yml
  + index.Rmd
  
## Mathematics

* MATLAB
* Mathematica
* Python
  + Functional
  + Mathematical
* Discrete Math 
  + Elisp
  + Erlang
* Calculus and Linear Algebra  

## Programming

* Python
* C/C++
* Java
  
## Operating Systems

* Linux
* Microsoft Windows
  + Active Directory
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch
  + Powershell
* Github
  + Git Bash
